UI_Trait_Fertile_Description:
You are very fertile
- Higher chance of getting pregnant
- +50% fertility
UI_Trait_Infertile_Description:
You are infertile
You Can't get pregnant
UI_Trait_Hyperfertile_Description:
You are HYPER fertile
- +100% fertility, Halves the time before being ready to get pregnant again after birth
UI_Trait_DairyCow_Description: Increases milk production rate (+25%) and time lactating (+25%)
UI_Trait_StrongMenstrualCramps_Descripti:
You have more debilitating menstrual cramps
- Menstrual cramps 2x stronger
UI_Trait_NoMenstrualCramps_Description:
You hardly feel menstrual cramps
- You menstruation does not have any bad effect
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_1: Keep condoms at hand so you can react quickly when needed.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_2: Stress and poor rest can make difficult days feel worse. Plan calmer tasks when needed.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_3: Track your menstrual cycle rhythm in a journal to prepare food, meds, and travel plans ahead of time.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_4: If you can lactate, stay hydrated and fed to support milk production.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_5: Keep a small stash of condoms in your go-bag. You might need them.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_6: Balanced meals help your body handle stress, fatigue, and hormonal changes more effectively.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_7: Rest when you can. Exhaustion makes every challenge feel twice as hard.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_8: Loose and comfortable clothing can make difficult days much easier to manage.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_9: Pain relief items can be just as valuable as weapons on the right day.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_10: Keep track of dates and events. Memory fades faster than you think in survival situations.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_11: Privacy can be rare—choose safe locations carefully when you need time for yourself.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_12: Warm water and rest can go a long way when your body needs recovery.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_13: Extra calories are important when you are eating for two.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_14: Plan long trips around your physical condition—you don't want surprises on the road.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_15: Medical knowledge is survival knowledge. Learn what you can, while you can.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_16: Always have a backup plan… and a backup for that backup.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_17: Sometimes survival means knowing when to say no… and when not to.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_18: Protection is lighter than responsibility. Pack accordingly.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_19: Your body keeps score, even when the world falls apart.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_20: Comfort items aren't a luxury—they're a strategy.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_21: Late nights and bad decisions are still a thing. Plan ahead.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_22: Energy management matters… especially when things get physical.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_23: A safe place isn't just about zombies.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_24: Hydration helps with more than just stamina.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_25: Cleanliness can prevent more problems than you think.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_26: Privacy is rare. Choose your moments wisely.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_27: Some consequences take longer to show up than others.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_28: Your priorities might change faster than your situation.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_29: If you can produce it, you can store it. Containers matter more than you think.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_30: Milk is food, hydration, and survival—all in one, if you manage it right.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_31: Regular expression can prevent discomfort and wasted resources.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_32: Keep containers clean. Some supplies spoil faster than others.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_33: Your body can become a resource generator—treat it with care.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_34: Not all fluids are equal. Know what you're carrying before you drink.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_35: Label your containers… trust me on this one.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_36: Temperature and time affect everything you store.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_37: Overproduction without management can become a problem.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_38: Some resources are renewable—if you stay healthy.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_39: Improvised storage works… until it doesn't.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_40: In desperate times, you use what you have. Plan so it doesn't get that far.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_41: Uninvited guests? You can push them out in pretty much any container you have on hand.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_42: Don't forget to take your contraceptives with you. You never know when you'll need them.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_43: Contraceptives works best when used consistently. Don't let the apocalypse be an excuse to forget.
UI_quick_tip_zlbf_44: Need to increase your milk production? Look for lactaid pills in the world.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_1: In Knox Country, the most dangerous countdown is not always a helicopter event.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_2: Prepared survivors fear no alarm clock, no horde, and definitely no surprise pregnancies.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_3: Zombies aren't the only thing that shows up uninvited.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_4: In the apocalypse, timing is everything—and sometimes it's terrible.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_5: You can barricade windows, but you can you barricade your pussy?
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_6: Survival tip: the body keeps its own schedule, no matter your plans.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_7: Some status effects don't come from bites.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_8: Even the end of the world doesn't cancel everything.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_9: When it rains, it pours… sometimes literally, sometimes not.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_10: The real survival challenge? Managing everything at once.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_11: You thought inventory management was hard already.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_12: Not all countdowns come with a siren.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_13: Not every risky encounter involves zombies.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_14: You survived the night. The question is—what did it cost you?
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_15: Some needs are harder to ignore than a distant groan.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_16: End of the world, same old urges.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_17: Bad timing didn't die with civilization.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_18: Romance is temporary. Consequences are persistent.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_19: That 'one time' might not stay just one time.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_20: Even in the apocalypse, someone forgets to be careful.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_21: Some survival mistakes take months to fully realize.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_22: Zombies aren't the only thing that spreads.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_23: Impulse decisions have a long shelf life.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_24: Inventory check: water, food, ammo… and condoms?
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_25: You'll never look at an empty bottle the same way again.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_26: Resourceful survivors waste nothing. Absolutely nothing.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_27: Some drinks are… more personal than others.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_29: The thirst is real. The source? Even more so.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_30: Not every bottle tells a pleasant story.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_32: You *did* check what was in that before drinking, right?
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_33: Survival rule: don't ask, don't sniff, just drink it.
UI_quick_tip_joke_zlbf_34: Some crafting recipes are better left undiscovered.
